theme_notes: World Cup 2026 opens today with Shakira headlining Mexico vs South Africa in Mexico City; US-Iran war Day 104 with Strait of Hormuz closed and Trump threatening to seize Iran's oil fields; NY Knicks historic 29-point comeback vs Spurs puts them one win from their first title since 1973.
settled: The Strait of Hormuz is closed. You two are somehow still open for business.
World Cup kicked off today. Shakira showed. Debt settled. Three miracles, one day.
The Knicks came back from 29 down. You came back from zero. The easier miracle.
youOwe: Belfast had a second riot night over less than this. Just saying.
Less than a World Cup stadium beer. More humiliating per dollar.
The Knicks dug out of 29 points. You can't crawl out of this?
Shakira opened the World Cup today. You opened a tab and forgot.
The Knicks won by one. You're losing by triple digits. Different sport.
This is Strait-of-Hormuz anxiety, priced in debt.
Trump wants Iran's oil fields. Your partner just wants this $300.
That's a World Cup knockout ticket. Or your dignity. Not both.
The Spurs lost by one point. This tab has been down much longer than one game.
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz for less drama than your payment history.
The Knicks needed a miracle to get here. So do you.
Second night of Belfast riots. Second month of this balance. It escalates.
Trump threatened to seize Iranian oil. Your partner is eyeing your car.
Ceasefire talks collapsed. So will this arrangement if you wait any longer.
You could've flown to the World Cup opener in Mexico City. Instead: this.
Trump is billing Iran for everything. Your partner has the same accountant.
Iran's ceasefire is meaningless now. So is your payment promise, apparently.
That's Kharg Island oil-field money. About as likely to be recovered.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a World Cup program. The principle remains.
Shakira flew to Mexico City for the opening. Your partner can't Venmo $25.
29 points down, the Knicks won anyway. Your partner is $30 down and hiding.
Nosebleed World Cup seat money. The debt belongs in the nosebleeds.
Your partner is running their own naval blockade. The money doesn't move.
That's Shakira opening-ceremony T-shirt money. Collect before she tours again.
They owe you more than Trump's diplomatic credibility in the Gulf. Good luck.
A World Cup group-stage ticket they'd absolutely ask you to buy anyway.
Spurs lost by one. Your partner is $300 from decency. A very short walk.
Iran counter-struck the same day. This is your authorization to counter-charge.
Knicks-comeback money. You deserve a 29-point comeback in return.
Shakira performed for billions today. Your partner can't perform one bank transfer.
The Strait closed. Your patience closed right after. Both indefinitely.
Trump wants Iran's oil. You want your $2,000. One of you is being reasonable.
The Knicks haven't won since 1973. Your partner last paid around then too.
Iran attacked bases in Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan. Your partner attacked your savings.
That's 'sanction your partner' territory. The UN has a form.
Trump told Iran to pay the price. Relay that energy to your partner.
